name: Dimensions unit values
description: List of possible unit values for Dimensions in SynapxIA (e.g., hours, days, etc.).

name: GenAI Adoption for Devs
description: Defines levels of adoption of Generative AI tools and practices among development teams.

name: GenAI Adoption for QA
description: Defines levels of adoption of Generative AI tools and practices among QA teams.

name: List action types for system configuration
description: List that classifies the types of actions that users can perform on assets in SynapxIA (e.g., Proposal, Review, Modification, Publication, Rejection, Deprecation, Vote).

name: List asset relation types for system configuration
description: List that classifies the types of relationships between assets in SynapxIA (e.g., Depends On, Related To, Similar To, Alternative To).

name: List asset statuses for system configuration
description: List that classifies the statuses of assets in SynapxIA (e.g., Created, Proposed, Feedback Provided, Published, Rejected).

name: List asset visibility for system configuration
description: List that classifies the visibility of assets in SynapxIA (e.g., Public, Private, Internal).

name: List characteristics for system configuration
description: List that classifies the types of characteristics (e.g., General, Technical, Commercial, Usability, Documentation and Platform) available in SynapxIA.

name: List types for system configuration
description: List that classifies the types of lists in two categories: List of Values and Scale.

name: Option types for navigation items
description: List that classifies application options by type, such as content pages, forms or reports.

name: Project status values
description: List of possible status values for Projects in SynapxIA (planned, in progress, on hold or complete).

name: Types of organizational units
description: List that classifies the types of organizational units (e.g., Department, Business Unit, Chapter) available in SynapxIA.
